rationale: Matches human fMRI, reward prediction error task, reinforcement learning, BIDS standard, CC0 license, reuse feasible.
Human fMRI but resting-state only; no reward or RL task. Task mismatch.
Reinforcement learning task matches, but mouse species and fiber photometry modality do not match human fMRI requirement.
Human fMRI with decision-making, adjacent to reward learning but not reward prediction error specifically.
Mouse, calcium imaging, visual cortex, orientation tuning task. Ideal match.
Mouse visual cortex but electrophysiology not calcium imaging. Modality mismatch is a hard negative.
Human fMRI, wrong species and modality.
Neuropixels extracellular electrophysiology, spike sorting affordance, NWB standard. Strong match.
Rat electrophysiology with spike times available. Spike sorting feasible.
EEG, no single-unit data. Hard negative: neural signal but wrong modality for spike sorting.
Monkey PFC single-unit recordings during working memory delayed-response task. Strong match.
Human EEG during working memory task. Cross-modality comparison feasible.
Human resting-state fMRI; no task structure.
Mouse probabilistic reward learning with trial-level behavioral structure. Model fitting feasible.
Human RL task with behavioral events in BIDS format. Model fitting feasible.
Decision-making contrast maps only; no trial-level behavioral events for model fitting.
Visual stimulation task; no behavioral choice or reward structure for model fitting.
